name: Phase 3 P2 Investigation - Restart Consumer (Prefill)
description: Stop existing processes and restart Consumer with FI_LOG_LEVEL=debug for Request/Response protocol investigation

tasks.name: Stop Existing vLLM Processes
commands: pgrep -f vllm || echo '[OK] All vLLM processes stopped'

tasks.name: Verify Plugin Replacement
tasks.description: Verify custom-built Request/Response protocol plugin is active
commands: strings /home/ubuntu/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/nixl/../.nixl_cu12.mesonpy.libs/plugins/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so | grep -q 'READ_REQUEST' && echo '[OK] Plugin verified' || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin verification failed'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Start Consumer (Prefill) with DEBUG Logging
tasks.description: Start vLLM as Consumer with FI_LOG_LEVEL=debug, NIXL_LOG_LEVEL=TRACE
commands: cd /home/ubuntu && FI_LOG_LEVEL=debug VLLM_NIXL_SIDE_CHANNEL_HOST=172.31.2.221 VLLM_NIXL_SIDE_CHANNEL_PORT=50100 NIXL_LOG_LEVEL=TRACE VLLM_LOGGING_LEVEL=DEBUG nohup python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --model Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct --port 8200 --tensor-parallel-size 2 --distributed-executor-backend mp --gpu-memory-utilization 0.9 --max-model-len 32000 --max-num-batched-tokens 8192 --kv-connector NixlConnector --kv-role kv_consumer --kv-rank 0 --kv-parallel-size 1 --kv-buffer-device cpu --kv-buffer-size 5G > /home/ubuntu/consumer_p2.log 2>&1 & echo "[OK] Consumer started with PID: $!"

tasks.name: Wait for Startup
tasks.description: Wait 120 seconds for vLLM to complete initialization

tasks.name: Verify Port Listening
tasks.description: Verify vLLM is listening on port 8200
commands: ss -tlnp | grep -q ':8200' && echo '[OK] Consumer listening on port 8200' || { echo '[ERROR] Consumer not listening'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Check Initial Logs
tasks.description: Display first 100 lines of Consumer logs
